'''Lirran Aro''' was the founder and chief designer of the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturing corporation [[Aro (manufacturer)|Aro]]. The corporation went into bankruptcy due to the attempted [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] of a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] official with one of Aro's security droids. Aro lived on [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].
